title: 2 Hot Air Balloon Photo Props, 2 Stands, 1 Pen (Blue, Pink), Hello World Baby Sign, Baby Announcement Sign for Nursery Decor, Welcome Home Baby Boy, Keepsake for Baby's First Moments
features: Complete Set: Includes 2 hot air balloon photo props, 2 stands, and 1 pen (blue, pink); Hello world baby sign perfect for creating memorable baby announcement photos and nursery decorations
Hello World Baby Sign: Features a charming design ideal for baby announcements; Use the included pen to personalize with your baby's name and birth details
Durable Construction: Baby announcement sign made from high-quality materials ensuring long-lasting use; Safe and gentle for baby's first moments and photo sessions
Versatile Use: Ideal for baby showers, nursery decor, and as a keepsake for baby's first moments; Adds a warm touch to any baby announcement photo
Thoughtful Gift: A perfect present for new parents and expecting parents; Baby announcement sign helps capture and cherish the precious early moments of a baby's life
